subject: F1000 short survey on reference management software
body:
Faculty of 1000 | http://f1000.com/    
=====================================

F1000 would greatly value your feedback on reference management software.  We want to learn about how you write and organize your papers, to help us to build better software for you in the future.

As a 'thank you' for your thoughts, respondents to the survey will be entered into a prize draw. The first prize is $150 USD Amazon vouchers, plus four runner-up prizes of $40 USD Amazon vouchers.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

 Start the survey now 
 > https://www.surveymonkey.com/s/8QL2FF7   

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Best regards,

Iain Hrynaszkiewicz
Outreach Director, Faculty of 1000

PS. The prize draw rules are here [ http://f1000.com/resources/F1000Prime_competition_rules_Apr2014.pdf ].

=====================================

You have received this message in the belief that it would be of interest. To stop receiving this type of information from Faculty of 1000, reply to this email with the word "remove" in the subject line. For further information or enquiries please contact info@f1000.com [mailto:info@f1000.com].

F1000, Faculty of 1000 Ltd | Science Navigation Group
Registered in England and Wales with Company Number 3739756.   
Middlesex House | 34-42 Cleveland Street | London W1T 4LB | United Kingdom
body_html:
To ensure you receive F1000 emails, add info@updates.f1000.com to your safelist. View web version.

F1000 would greatly value your feedback on reference management software. We want to learn about how you write and organize your papers, to help us to build better software for you in the future.

As a 'thank you' for your thoughts, respondents to the survey will be entered into a prize draw. The first prize is $150 USD Amazon vouchers, plus four runner-up prizes of $40 USD Amazon vouchers.

Start the survey now

Best regards,

Iain Hrynaszkiewicz
Outreach Director, Faculty of 1000
